message.title: message
message.description: Status message. If no slots available it will say so and the agent should ask the user to pick another date.

slotList.title: slotList
slotList.description: All available time slots in pipe-delimited format: 1|10:00 AM - 10:30 AM,2|10:30 AM - 11:00 AM. Parse by splitting on comma then pipe. Position 1 is slot number, position 2 is the exact slot label to store and pass to Create Test Drive.

totalCount.title: totalCount
totalCount.description: Total number of available time slots for the selected dealer and date.
